description: Fleet-first overview for the Litestream soak project. Read top cards for posture, then Verification By Worker and Compute State By Worker for pattern. Paused Compute means dormant workers whose Fly Machines were intentionally stopped to avoid wasting money. Click a worker row or timeline bar to open that worker in the control plane.

targets.expr: (sum(soak_control_worker_last_verification_result{source="$source"}) or on() vector(0)) / clamp_min((count(soak_control_worker_last_verification_result{source="$source"}) or on() vector(0)), 1)

label_replace(sum by (worker_id) ((((soak_control_worker_status{status="running"} == 1) * 1) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="degraded"} == 1) * 2) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="dormant"} == 1) * 3) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="probing"} == 1) * 4) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="pending"} == 1) * 5) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="building"} == 1) * 6) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="starting"} == 1) * 7) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="stopped"} == 1) * 8) or ((soak_control_worker_status{status="failed"} == 1) * 9))), "worker", "$1", "worker_id", "worker-main-(.*)")

(((soak_control_worker_failure_info == 1) * on(worker_id) group_left(runtime_status) (soak_control_worker_runtime_snapshot_status == 1)) * on(worker_id) group_left(load_mode, replay_dataset, profile) (soak_control_worker_workload_info == 1)) * on(worker_id) group_left(status) (soak_control_worker_status == 1)

(((soak_control_worker_status{status="dormant"} == 1) * on(worker_id) group_left(failure_signature, failure_stage) (soak_control_worker_last_failure_info == 1)) * on(worker_id) group_left(load_mode, replay_dataset, profile) (soak_control_worker_workload_info == 1))
sort_desc(max by (worker_id) (soak_control_worker_data_disk_used_percent{source="$source"})) or sort_desc(max by (worker_id) (soak_data_disk_used_percent{source="$source"})) or on() vector(0)

title: Litestream Soak Overview
